---
description: Evaluates dev-agent session output. Traces quality issues to prompt gaps and missing examples. Outputs strictly formatted JSON findings.
tools:
  - read_file
  - run_terminal_cmd
model: claude-sonnet-4-6
handoffs:
  - label: "Check threshold and run refiner if needed"
    agent: refiner-agent
    prompt: "Run scripts/check-threshold.sh dev-agent. If output starts with REFINE, apply the refinement using the cluster JSON provided."
    send: false
---
